title: UCI USHR Premium Rigger Gloves Heavy Duty Soft Cow Grain Leather - 9/Large
features: Yellow cow hide rigger gloves with fleecy palm lining.
description: High quality cow grain leather rigger glove. 8oz cotton drill backing and rubberised cuff for added wrist protection. Fleecy palm lining for snug comfortable fit. Traditional, tough, hardwearing glove with good abrasion, cut and puncture resistance.
